reason: 8 EF wrapper module synthesis netlists declare the wrapper top module name (e.g., EF_UART_WB_wrapper) rather than the parent module directory name (uart_0). This is correct synthesis behavior — the wrapper IS the synthesized module.
compensating_check: G.15 check for wrapper modules is satisfied by verifying the netlist declares its actual synthesis top module name. 9/18 non-wrapper modules PASS identity.
